# Stack Scout

> Public-facing tools destination for curated builder tools, services, APIs, MCPs, CLIs, and apps.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/): Editorial front door, featured tools, categories, updates, and lab subset.
- [Top tools](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/catalog/): Searchable catalog of tracked tools and lab products.
- [Categories](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/): Website, service, API, MCP, CLI, web-app, and desktop-app lanes.
- [Wire](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/updates/): Recent public activity and noteworthy tool movement.
- [Radar](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/radar/): Worth-watching tools and systems.
- [Collections](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/collections/): Curated use-case groupings.
- [Sources & method](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/method/): Badge definitions, freshness rules, and editorial guardrails.

## Agent Notes

- This public site excludes private operational records and local W-drive state.
- Prefer official source links and dated update entries before repeating tool claims.
- Public verdicts use editorial badges rather than fake numeric scores.
